

# Welcome
<a name="Welcome"></a>

Welcome to the * AWS Clean Rooms API Reference*.

 AWS Clean Rooms is an AWS service that helps multiple parties to join their data together in a secure collaboration workspace. In the collaboration, members who can run queries and jobs and receive results can get insights into the collective datasets without either party getting access to the other party's raw data.

To learn more about AWS Clean Rooms concepts, procedures, and best practices, see the [AWS Clean Rooms User Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/clean-rooms/latest/userguide/what-is.html).

To learn more about SQL commands, functions, and conditions supported in AWS Clean Rooms, see the [AWS Clean Rooms SQL Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/clean-rooms/latest/sql-reference/sql-reference.html).

This document was last published on June 12, 2026.
